◎简　　介  

　　As the real estate market is in a downward spiral, beautiful young realtor Lauren Baker gets the listing of a lifetime. A mansion on Chicago's exclusive Gold Coast has fallen into her lap and she is able to quickly find a cash buyer for the brother and sister who are selling their parents' estate.
